# searchstax_usage_extended (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `account_name` (String)
- `month` (Number)
- `year` (Number)

### Read-Only

- `events` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--events))
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
